addFont.title: Add Google Font
addFont.heading: Add Google Font
addFont.description: Add a custom font from Google Fonts to use in your annotations.
addFont.urlHelp: Get this from Google Fonts: Select a font → Click "Get font" → Copy the @import URL
addFont.nameHelp: This is how the font will appear in the font selector
addFont.enterUrl: Please enter a Google Fonts import URL
addFont.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid Google Fonts URL
addFont.extractFailed: Could not extract font family from URL
addFont.loadTimeout: Font took too long to load. Please check the URL and try again.
addFont.loadFailed: The font could not be loaded. Please verify the Google Fonts URL is correct.

shortcutsConfig.resetNotice: Reset to default shortcuts — click Save to apply
shortcutsConfig.instructions: Click a shortcut then press the new key combination. Press Esc to cancel.
